sprite

visit.hpp

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 
00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/node.hpp"
00007 
00008 namespace sprite
00009 {
00016   template<typename Visitor>
00017   inline typename Visitor::result_type
00018   visit(Visitor const & visitor, Node const & node)
00019   {
00020     switch(node.tag())
00021     {
00022       #define SPRITE_visit(tag,arity) \
00023           visitor(static_cast<meta::NodeOf<tag,arity>::type const &>(node));
00024 
00025       case FAIL:   return SPRITE_visit(FAIL,-1);
00026       case CHOICE: return SPRITE_visit(CHOICE,-1);
00027       case INT:    return SPRITE_visit(INT,-1);
00028       case FLOAT:  return SPRITE_visit(FLOAT,-1);
00029       case CTOR:
00030       {
00031         switch(node.arity())
00032         {
00033           case 0:  return SPRITE_visit(CTOR,0);
00034           case 1:  return SPRITE_visit(CTOR,1);
00035           case 2:  return SPRITE_visit(CTOR,2);
00036           default: return SPRITE_visit(CTOR,-1);
00037         }
00038       }
00039       case OPER:
00040       {
00041         switch(node.arity())
00042         {
00043           case 0:  return SPRITE_visit(OPER,0);
00044           case 1:  return SPRITE_visit(OPER,1);
00045           case 2:  return SPRITE_visit(OPER,2);
00046           default: return SPRITE_visit(OPER,-1);
00047         }
00048       }
00049       case FWD: return SPRITE_visit(FWD,-1);
00050       default: throw RuntimeError("a corrupted node was encountered");
00051 
00052       #undef SPRITE_visit
00053     }
00054   }
00055 
00056   namespace detail
00057   {
00058     // Wraps a visitor object; removes const qualifiers from the node argument
00059     // before the visitor is called (safe, as used below).
00060     template<typename Visitor> struct UnwrapConst
00061     {
00062       typedef typename Visitor::result_type result_type;
00063       explicit UnwrapConst(Visitor const & visitor) : m_visitor(visitor) {}
00064     private:
00065       Visitor const & m_visitor;
00066     public:
00067       // Unary visitation.
00068       template<typename Payload>
00069       result_type operator()(Node_<Payload> const & node) const
00070         { return m_visitor(const_cast<Node_<Payload> &>(node)); }
00071 
00072       // Binary visitation.
00073       template<typename Payload0, typename Payload1>
00074       result_type operator()(
00075           Node_<Payload0> const & node0, Node_<Payload1> const & node1
00076         ) const
00077       {
00078         return m_visitor(
00079             const_cast<Node_<Payload0> &>(node0)
00080           , const_cast<Node_<Payload1> &>(node1)
00081           );
00082       }
00083     };
00084   }
00085 
00087   template<typename Visitor>
00088   inline typename Visitor::result_type
00089   visit(Visitor const & visitor, Node & node)
00090   {
00091     detail::UnwrapConst<Visitor> const unwrapper(visitor);
00092     return visit(unwrapper, static_cast<Node const &>(node));
00093   }
00094 
00095   namespace detail
00096   {
00097     // A helper for implementing the binary form of the visit function.  This
00098     // uses the unary visit to resolve each abstract Node argument
00099     // step-by-step.
00100     template<typename Visitor> struct BinaryVisitor
00101     {
00102       typedef typename Visitor::result_type result_type;
00103 
00104       // Two abstract args.
00105       result_type operator()(
00106           Visitor const & visitor, Node const & lhs, Node const & rhs
00107         ) const
00108       {
00109         return visit(
00110             tr1::bind<result_type>(*this, visitor, _1, tr1::ref(rhs))
00111           , lhs
00112           );
00113       }
00114 
00115       // One abstract arg.
00116       template<typename Lhs>
00117       result_type operator()(
00118           Visitor const & visitor, Lhs const & lhs, Node const & rhs
00119         ) const
00120       { return visit(tr1::bind<result_type>(*this, visitor, lhs, _1), rhs); }
00121 
00122       // Zero abstract args.
00123       template<typename Lhs, typename Rhs>
00124       result_type operator()(
00125           Visitor const & visitor, Lhs const & lhs, Rhs const & rhs
00126         ) const
00127       { return visitor(lhs, rhs); }
00128     };
00129   }
00130 
00141   template<typename Visitor>
00142   inline typename Visitor::result_type
00143   visit(Visitor const & visitor, Node const & lhs, Node const & rhs)
00144     { return detail::BinaryVisitor<Visitor>()(visitor, lhs, rhs); }
00145 
00147   template<typename Visitor>
00148   inline typename Visitor::result_type
00149   visit(Visitor const & visitor, Node & lhs, Node & rhs)
00150   {
00151     detail::UnwrapConst<Visitor> const unwrapper(visitor);
00152     return visit(unwrapper
00153       , static_cast<Node const &>(lhs), static_cast<Node const &>(rhs)
00154       );
00155   }
00156 }
